About page

My name is Ken Stevens. I am a citizen if the United States, but I am currently living in the Philippines where I am married to a beautiful filipina and have two beautiful step daighters.

I am a Father, husband, a step-father, A software Engineer, A computer programmer, A taxi-cab driver, and many other things throughout my long life. But most of all, I am a child of God. That is what I would like to be known as.
